${modID}:Sozo.NAME: Sozo
${modID}:Sozo.FLAVOR: Huh. Turns out there's only so much magic it can eat. Neat.
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain [E] at the start of each turn.

${modID}:RitesOfZapis.NAME: Rites of Zapis
${modID}:RitesOfZapis.FLAVOR: Every summer it demands three drops of blood from a child's finger, and every winter it pays back that bounty.
DESCRIPTIONS: During the first turn of combat, ALL potions have #b
more #yPotency.

${modID}:FieldAlchemyNotes.NAME: Notes on Field Alchemy
${modID}:FieldAlchemyNotes.FLAVOR: This illustrated guide covers techniques to make field alchemy faster, safer, and less stressful!
DESCRIPTIONS: It no longer costs [E] to #yBrew a #yPotion.

${modID}:BlueTrimmedNotebook.NAME: Blue Notebook
${modID}:BlueTrimmedNotebook.FLAVOR: I'm getting tired of customers refusing to buy anything. All the effort I go through to make these for them, and they don't appreciate it!
DESCRIPTIONS: #yUpgrade #b
random #yReagents in each reward, allowing you to #y${modID}:Gather more.

${modID}:ChimerelixisNotes.NAME: Notes on Chimerelixis
${modID}:ChimerelixisNotes.FLAVOR: ...temporary transformation...monstrous man-chimera....strength, healing, reaction speed...dampens fear...
DESCRIPTIONS: Replace #pStarter #yStrikes with #yBrewing #yStrikes, appropriately #yUpgraded. #yBrewing #yStrikes are still #pStarter #yStrikes.

${modID}:TitaniCiderNotes.NAME: Notes on Titani-Cider
DESCRIPTIONS: Replace #pStarter #yDefends with #yFume #yVeils, appropriately #yUpgraded. #yFume #yVeils are still #pStarter #yDefends.

${modID}:VolteaRegiaNotes.NAME: Notes on Voltea Regia
DESCRIPTIONS: When you drink a potion, channel an #y${modID}:Elemental.

${modID}:OpthistoriaNotes.NAME: Notes on Opthistoria
DESCRIPTIONS: When you drink a potion, gain #b
#yVigor for each potion used this combat. NL Next: #b

${modID}:BruteforceMethod.NAME: Bruteforce Method
${modID}:BruteforceMethod.FLAVOR: Theoretically, with inhuman magic reserves and no proficiency, once could bruteforce an Alkahest reaction...
DESCRIPTIONS: [WIP] Unlocks the #rBlood brewing mode. You can lose #b
#gHP #b
times instead of [E] when brewing potions.
NL NL #pPRIORITIZED - #yRight #yclick to disable

${modID}:PreciseMethod.NAME: Precise Method
${modID}:PreciseMethod.FLAVOR: If one were precise enough to measure reagents down to a hundreth of a gram, it may be possible to cause a Blas reaction with no magic at all...
DESCRIPTIONS: You can discard #b
cards, instead of paying [E] when brewing potions. If you do, draw a card.

${modID}:ResonanceMethod.NAME: Resonance Method
${modID}:ResonanceMethod.FLAVOR: Introducing high-density sources of mana to the potion could excite the Concrete to cause a reaction if one could find them...
DESCRIPTIONS: You can destroy #b
orbs instead of paying [E] when brewing potions.

${modID}:HarmonicMethod.NAME: Harmonic Method
${modID}:HarmonicMethod.FLAVOR: An alchemist with a methodical mana flow can very rarely cause a mutual reaction between the Regulus and Humor to take place...
DESCRIPTIONS: You can evoke exactly #b
orbs instead of paying [E] when brewing potions.
